patches_modified.name: Disable telemetry
patches_modified.description: Disables CamScanner's custom telemetry system.

patches_modified.name: Enable Premium
patches_modified.description: Enables some app features locked behind the subscription paywall. Certain server-side functionality may be unavailable.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Ninja VPN premium.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks local Proton VPN premium  features.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks 1Tap Cleaner PRO: history export, app-group filters, unlimited cache targets, ad removal.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium+
patches_modified.description: Unlocks AccuWeather's Premium+ subscription tier without a Play Store purchase. Enables the full 15-day and hourly forecast detail, MinuteCast extended precision, air quality and health indexes, real-feel temperature, severe weather notifications, and widget customisation.

patches_modified.name: Unlock VIP (Lifetime)
patches_modified.description: Forces permanent professional VIP tier, removes ads and upgrade popups, bypasses PairIP.

patches_modified.name: Remove Watermark
patches_modified.description: Removes watermarks from Canva exports and previews.

patches_removed.name: Bypass PairIP License Check
patches_removed.description: Makes LicenseClient.checkLicense() a no-op so the app never shows the license-denied blocking screen.

patches_modified.name: Bypass member rights check
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberCheckResult.isPassed() to always return Boolean.TRUE, bypassing the server-side membership gate and preventing the 'Get Premium / 7-day trial' dialog.

patches_modified.name: Clear VIP resolution tip
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.getVipResolutionTip() to always return Boolean.FALSE, suppressing any 'VIP only' badge shown on resolution options.

patches_modified.name: Spoof member active status
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberInfo.isActive() to always return true, making the app believe the membership subscription is active.

patches_modified.name: Spoof member days left
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberInfo.getDaysLeft() to always return 3650 (10 years), preventing the '0 days left' display on the premium screen.

patches_modified.name: Spoof member provider flags
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberProvider.c() (kv_is_pay_enable_member) and MemberProvider.e() (kv_is_skip_ad) to always return true.

patches_modified.name: Suppress newbie bonus dialog
patches_modified.description: Makes MemberProvider.w(F)V return immediately, suppressing the 'Claim 7-day trial / newbies bonus' ClaimMemberDialog popup.

patches_modified.name: Unlock member resolution
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.isUnlock() to always return Boolean.TRUE, making all locally-cached episodes appear as unlocked to the playback layer.

patches_added.name: Yearly Unlock
patches_added.description: Unlocks premium features without login. Note: Login Won't Work

patches_removed.name: Yearly unlock
patches_removed.description: Unlocks premium features without login. Note: Login Won't Work

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all Photo Editor premium features by bypassing license checks.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Drama Episodes
patches_modified.description: Bypasses the IAA (ad-watch-to-unlock) episode gate for drama mini-series.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Toxly Premium

patches_modified.name: Remove Ads
patches_modified.description: Removes interstitial and exit native ads from m-Indicator.

patches_modified.name: Bypass License Check
patches_modified.description: Bypasses PairIP DRM license verification to prevent forced app shutdown on non-Play-licensed installs.

patches_modified.name: Bypass Subscription Paywall
patches_modified.description: Bypasses the subscription paywall in-app.

patches_modified.name: Remove Item Limits
patches_modified.description: Removes all  item limits in-app.

patches_modified.name: Suppress Premium Promotions
patches_modified.description: Supress all premium promotions in-app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Followed Locations
patches_modified.description: Unlocks the Followed Locations premium feature.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Premium Features In the App.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Lifetime
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all Lifetime features in Proxyman.

patches_modified.name: Remove Ads / Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Forces SubscriptionStateImpl.getStatus() (LB2/c.h) to always return HAS_UNLIMITED_SUBSCRIPTION and getPurchase() (LB2/c.g) to return a well-formed fake Purchase, removing ads and the upgrade button/banner without crashing on the now-expected non-null Purchase object.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Removes ads and unlocks the no-ads subscription in RAR.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all premium features in Case Tracker — Immigration.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks SkinSort premium features.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Splitwise Pro features, removes ad banners, and suppresses all upgrade upsell prompts.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Subscription
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all subscription features in TWT App.

patches_modified.name: Alert Distances
patches_modified.description:
Configures radar/camera and hazard alert announcement distances.
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.

patches_modified.name: AutoZoom
patches_modified.description:
Controls how aggressively the map zooms in/out based on driving speed.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod

patches_modified.name: Disable Ads
patches_modified.description:
Suppresses all Waze ad systems via bundled preferences file:
• AdMob SDK (Ad_.*)
• Google Ads (Google_Ads.*)
• Ads Inventory Prediction
• ExternalPOI pins, coupons, popups (ExternalPO_ + Extern__POI both key variants)
• Search autocomplete server ads
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (ExternalPOI keys), Waze Chuppito (dual-key coverage).

patches_modified.name: Disable Advil Ad Requests
patches_modified.description: Stubs AdvilRequest.getPageUrl() → "" so the Advil ad server receives no page URL and returns no ad content.

patches_modified.name: Enlarged Speedometer
patches_modified.description: Increases speedometer digit size for better readability.

patches_modified.name: Map Skin (Vitamin C)
patches_modified.description:
Applies Chuppito's 'Vitamin C' map skin. All visual values configurable.
• Night: true black AMOLED background (saves battery, prevents burn-in)
• Day: warm beige background
• Larger font labels across the board
• Wider navigation arrow head for better visibility
• Custom car 3D models: Batmobile, Riddler, race car, 3D arrow
Credits: ALEX02-GTT (skin design), Waze Chuppito Mod (integration).

patches_modified.name: Navigation & Map
patches_modified.description:
Configures navigation and map behaviour:
• Nearing destination distance (Credits: CGE Mod)
• Android Auto head-up alert distances
• Map turn mode (auto-zoom to upcoming turn)
• Traffic bar minimum time threshold
• GPS icon visibility
• Route notifications (hazard, school zone) both disabled by default
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (nearing destination), Waze Chuppito (remaining keys).

patches_modified.name: Popup Suppression
patches_modified.description:
Prevents promotional and ad popups from appearing while driving.
Raises the minimum trigger speed to a near-impossible value so popups never appear.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod.

patches_modified.name: Radar Sound (Any Speed)
patches_modified.description: Plays radar/speed camera sound alerts regardless of current speed. Official Waze only alerts when over the speed limit.

patches_modified.name: Report Speed Limit
patches_modified.description: Adds a Report option when tapping the speedometer to report wrong or missing speed limits. Not available in the official version.

patches_modified.name: Speed Limit Sign
patches_modified.description: Sets the speed limit sign style shown on the map.

patches_modified.name: Uncensored Radar / Camera Display
patches_modified.description:
Shows exact fixed and mobile speed camera locations, including those not yet in the official Waze radar zone. Enables enforcement alerts via preferences keys:
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks The Weather Channel's Premium and Premium Pro subscription tiers. Enables the ad-free experience, extended 15-day hourly forecast, real-feel temperature, air quality index, minute-by-minute precipitation, severe weather notifications, and radar overlays gated behind the subscription paywall.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Windscribe premium account.

patches_modified.name: Unlock VIP
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Yatri VIP by forcing active plan status and spoofing active plan DB query.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Pro features in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Ad-Free
patches_modified.description: Removes ads and unlocks ad-free status in Speedtest by Ookla.

patches_modified.name: Unlock All Features
patches_modified.description: Bypasses PairIP DRM license check, removes all paywalls, and unlocks all premium features including cloud sync and remote access.
